guardrails: W1.5.209 turns W1.5.208 needs_followup decisions into scoped repair or capture tasks without implementing those tasks.
No repair-plan field may mark any FR accepted, ready, completed, or phase-exit satisfied.

No plan field may contain raw prompts, raw model output, uploaded-file bytes, query/hash secrets, response bodies, artifact bodies, secure paths, cache paths, output directory values, full destination paths, prompt_to_user, or custom_value content.
FR-015 remains excluded until ADR-0012 or another accepted restore/continue contract exists.
EXIT-P1-1 remains not_ready and accepted_items remains zero.

repair_tracks.title: A4 stream phase capture
repair_tracks.objective: Replace stream-panel fixture evidence gaps with reviewer-visible phase-level capture evidence and final event labels.

repair_tracks.title: A4 runtime bridge user-path capture
repair_tracks.objective: Capture reviewer-visible Desktop/runtime user paths for bridge-ready work without storing raw content.

repair_tracks.title: A8 Git-history prerequisite
repair_tracks.objective: Produce the Git-history audit prerequisite before FR-012 can receive A4 acceptance.

repair_items.objective: Capture first-viewport default collapsed stream panel behavior as reviewer-visible UX evidence.
required_actions: Run or prepare a phase-level stream UX capture showing the panel above the Chat Box in default collapsed state.
Record summary and unread affordances without raw stream payload values.
Route the resulting capture back into A4 review rather than marking FR-009 accepted.
acceptance_blockers: A4 reviewer has not recorded first-viewport collapsed stream acceptance.
Phase-level UX recording is still missing.

repair_items.objective: Capture expanded stream panel readability against workflow-backed or equivalent phase-level events.
required_actions: Show thought summary, tool call, phase result, and AI reply classes in an expanded stream panel.
Keep unknown-event fallback visible without raw payload exposure.
Record A4 decision only after reviewer-visible capture exists.
acceptance_blockers: A4 reviewer has not accepted the full expanded event taxonomy as an end-user path.
Real workflow stream demo evidence is still missing.

repair_items.objective: Prepare final user-facing StreamEvent labels and capture them in phase-level stream evidence.
required_actions: Define the reviewer-visible event label set from accepted stream_event.md categories.
Capture known and unknown event rendering with final labels.
Keep payload summaries metadata-only.
acceptance_blockers: A4 reviewer has not accepted final user-facing labels for every event class.
Phase-level demo stream evidence is still missing.

repair_items.objective: Prove desktop-to-runtime run-once success and capture mode placement behavior.
required_actions: Run a desktop workbench path that dispatches step-mode run-once to runtime and observes success metadata.
Capture mode controls near the execution action without response body retention.
Keep semi_auto and auto behavior fail-closed unless accepted backend support exists.
acceptance_blockers: Backend run-once execution success has not been proven end-to-end from the desktop workbench.
A4 UX acceptance evidence for execution mode placement and behavior is not recorded.

repair_items.objective: Capture current-node and global Workflow Chat instruction routing as A4 user paths.
required_actions: Show both Workflow and Current node Chat scopes in reviewer-visible Desktop capture.
Confirm runtime submit-instruction routing without retaining raw instruction text.
Do not claim project-backed command history unless a separate accepted follow-up implements it.
acceptance_blockers: A4 UX acceptance evidence for the runtime-backed current-node/global Workflow Chat instruction path is not recorded.
Project-backed command history and persistence remain outside this evidence refresh and must not be inferred from local receipt metadata.

repair_items.objective: Capture the full new-project UX path with initial reference import.
required_actions: Show project creation, mandatory Git proof, and initial reference import in one reviewer-visible path.
Keep task background and reference bytes out of evidence snapshots.
Return the result to A4 review before claiming FR-011 acceptance.
acceptance_blockers: A4 UX acceptance evidence for the full new-project path is not recorded.

repair_items.objective: Prepare A8 Git-history audit evidence before FR-012 A4 acceptance.
required_actions: Audit automatic commit and tag behavior against runtime_harness.md.
Capture that project creation cannot bypass Git initialization.
Route A8 evidence into A4 acceptance only after audit material exists.
acceptance_blockers: A8 git-history audit evidence for automatic commit/tag behavior is not recorded.
A4 UX acceptance evidence for the mandatory Git path is not recorded.

repair_items.objective: Capture reference import, list, enable, disable, and view user paths.
required_actions: Show reference lifecycle operations from the desktop workbench.
Keep raw file content and uploaded bytes out of capture artifacts.
Keep delete semantics excluded until accepted spec material defines them.
acceptance_blockers: A4 UX acceptance evidence for reference import, enable, disable, and view user paths is not recorded.
Delete semantics remain intentionally out of scope until accepted spec material defines them.

repair_items.objective: Capture Skill candidate discovery and secret-safe MCP configuration display.
required_actions: Show runtime-backed Skill candidate discovery and per-project enable or disable state.
Show MCP metadata as server id, transport, enabled, approval, and secret-ref-present only.
Reject persisted params, raw command_or_url, raw secret_ref, or credentials in evidence.
acceptance_blockers: A4 UX acceptance evidence for secret-safe Skill configuration display is not recorded.

repair_items.objective: Capture selected-node Task Drawer artifact details and native open/download user path.
required_actions: Show selected-node artifact metadata in the Task Drawer.
Exercise open/download handoff with metadata-only action evidence.
Do not expose artifact body, raw bytes, full destination path, secure path, cache path, or output directory values.
acceptance_blockers: A4 UX acceptance evidence for node artifact detail display and safe open/download behavior is not recorded.

repair_items.objective: Capture high-risk HITL pause, decision, and resume as a reviewer-visible path.
required_actions: Show pending high-risk HITL decision discovery, review context, decision choices, and labels.
Submit a safe decision through the accepted decisions path and observe resume metadata.
Keep prompt_to_user, custom_value content, raw prompt, model output, and response bodies out of evidence.
acceptance_blockers: A4 UX acceptance evidence for high-risk HITL pause/resume behavior is not recorded.

excluded_items.reason: Snapshot restore/continue remains blocked until ADR-0012 or another accepted contract exists.

next_recommended_slices.title: A4 stream phase capture execution
next_recommended_slices.reason: Execute the first W1.5.209 repair track for FR-009, FR-010, and FR-016 while keeping all FR acceptance decisions pending A4 review.
